prompt: Draw a pixel art sword icon (16x16). The sword should be diagonal, pointing top-right, with a silver blade, gold crossguard, and brown handle. Save as sword.svg

assertions.text: An SVG file named sword.svg exists in the outputs directory
assertions.name: svg_file_exists

assertions.text: The SVG contains silver/grey colors for the blade (#aaaaaa, #cccccc, #c0c0c0, #888888, or similar)
assertions.name: silver_blade_colors

assertions.text: The SVG contains gold/yellow colors for the crossguard (#f4d03f, #ffd700, #daa520, or similar)
assertions.name: gold_crossguard_colors
